message:
review(sync): complete sync package v3 readiness review (bd-ats9.2)

Reviewed sync-related code for ShouldExportJSONL() usage and federation mode handling.

Findings:
- bd-u9yv (NEW): daemon_sync.go exports JSONL without sync mode check
- bd-t8x8 (NEW): architectural task to centralize sync mode checks
- Confirmed bd-ixip, bd-a9ka patterns exist in additional locations
